message:
Fix: Correct IsSafe initialization in compound command classification

The classifyCompoundCommand function incorrectly initialized IsSafe to true,
causing compound commands with no pattern matches to be marked as "safe".
This was inconsistent with ClassifyCommand which correctly initializes
IsSafe to false. Now both functions use consistent semantics: IsSafe=false
by default, only set to true when explicitly matching a SAFE pattern.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
